title: podocarpus costalis
intro: Podocarpus costalis, also known as the Coastal Yellowwood or Yellow Wood, is a species of coniferous tree native to the coastal regions of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Podocarpus costalis include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote respiratory health and relieve cold and flu symptoms.
